TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Senkonghuy (聖公會:Church of England, Anglican Church, Episcopal Church) == 1. Lalengawan Tana pifalican to pitoor a onto itiya, Inkiris a hongti ci Hengli saka falo (1491-tomireng 1509-1547). O tomesekay to Tingsokiw, i 1521 miheca mitilid to "Pitoay sapipaso'elin" sapi co'ay ci Lotean, ci Pope Leo X mipatireng cingra to "Mipa'esay to pitoor" sanay. Toya miheca o sapilekapotaw ci Anne Boleyn (1507- 1536) mararamod, malaliyas to ma'acisay a fafahi ci Catherine of Aragon (1485-1536), caay ka haydaen no pimamaan no Tingsokiw, mipakokot to itiyaay citodongay hoyin a Inkiris kakeridan pitoor ci Thomas Woosley (1475-1530), caay pilalan, nanoya pakokoten ci Thomas o mifelihay, mapatay i pirepet pipatayra i London. Patireng han ni Hengli saka falo ci Thomas Cranmer (1489-1556) a pala kakeridan no pitoor. I 1534 miheca pakayni i kalomaocan no kitakit mapatireng mihokok: Satakaraway sarikec : (1) O sakowan no kakeridan pitoor ko Inkelan. (2) O Inkiris kitakit pitooran misiiked to Roma Tingsokiw, o hongti ko satakaraway kakeridan no Inkiris kitakit. Nanoya malaliyas ko Pitooran no Inkiris to Roma Tingsokiw itiya. Ci Hengli saka falo nao sapidoedoan to pakayraan i, o sapiliyasaw to sakowan no Roma Tingsokiw, nika caay to ka laheci. Midotoc ci Edward saka enem (1547-1553) tangasa 16 ko miheca ko 'orip, oya fades a kaka to fafahiyan ko midotocay ci Mary hongti ko midotocay (1553-1558), ona mitiliday cingra to pitilidan no Tingsokiw, o tomesekay to Tingsokiw a mitooray. Macakat mapatireng mifades cingra to mitooray to no kitakit a pitooran, sapipalowadaw to Tingsokiw. O 'alomanay tamdaw nanoya milaliw tayra i Geneva, minanam to ni Calvin to no to'as sifana'. Mapatireng ci Elizabeth hongti (1558-1603) itiya, itiya patiko ko Inkiris kitakit a pitoor. Tangasa i 1559 miheca 4 folad 29 romi'ad, lomaoc no kitakit mihayda to cecay satakaraway rikec, midotoc tonini a rikec, o pipalasawad to no Roma Tingsokiw sakowan i Inkiris, caay to pafeli to maanan a payso to Roma, nanoya patirengen ni Elizabeth hongti ci Rev.Matthew Parker mala satakaraway citodongay kakeridan no pitooran kitakit i Canterbury kiwkay. Nanoya o Canterbury a miya mala kacitodongan to no Inkiris kitakit pitooran a Anlikan kiwkay a pafaloco'an. 2. Kasateked: To'as rayray no Keritokiw kiwkay palitosaan; adihayay ko nidotocan o kawanan. Tingsokiw o kawanan, o Senkonghuy kai terongan (Bishop Joseph Hall, 1574-1656—Via Media1622), ni Lote pakawili, no pifalic a pitooran masakawili, no Cinsinhuy mangalef ko kasawili. I 18 sician a Senkonghuy malakilac: Takaraway: patodong to Tingsokiw malakilac ko citodongay to ta'ong, mararid mihiseiki, nai Lancelot Andrewes (1556-1626) ato Archbishop Laud, (1573- 1645) ko patodongan. Ikor sato serer sanay to, itiya i 1830 miheca oya Oxford onto i, malaliyaw a ci'icel. Masereday: pasifa'elohay kiwkay, misafaloco' to sakakaay ko Fangcalay Cudad, nai William Wilberforce, (1759-1833) ko patodongan. Miala to kapolongan sapitolon . Dadahalay: mikiharay to kiwkay, syakay ato ponka, nai kadademakan ko pikiharan a demak ko tayalen. I 1544 miheca a Canterbury Archbishop Cranmer mihapiw to kapolongan satolon . I 1549 miheca mihapiw to kapolongan satolon a tilid, caay ka ci radiw. Tangasa i 1550 miheca itiya nai ci John Merberke (c1510- 1585)Ko misanga'ay to radiw padeteng to "Ciradiway a satolon" . Katadamaan no Senkonghuy: (1) Sakaridan citodongay. (2)Midemak to kapolongan satolon. (3)1535 miheca o Inkiris a fangcalay cudad. (4) Inkiris kitakit pitooran nai 1920 miheca i Lamped (Lambeth) kapolongan kakeridan laoc (1867) miheca saratatay lomaoc itiya, mitahidang to polong no 'oriraw a kasa kakeridan no kiwkay, i Canterbury tadamanay kakeridan ko mikeriday to kalomaoc. 10 miheca kinacecay o satakaraway no Senkonghuy, matiya o kapolongan kalomaocan matelek: (1) Sakakaay ko Fangcalay Cudad. (2) Tasaay sakolicay: Paino' ato pitaheka. (3) Kakeridan no pitoor. O palaheci to sowal Kawasan a panokeran (Korisimas kiwkay) Vs. Tongcenciaw a Korisimas kiwkay; o Sini pitooran panoker i kasemseman romi'ad a kiwkay. Caay ko nano Roma Tinsokiw ko sakaira no Senkonghuy, o nano anof ni Hengli saka falo a hongti. Kalimelaan kina Senkonghuy awaay ko tadamaanay a kawasan tamdaw, matiya ci Lote ano eca ci Calvin ko katadamaan. Orira a masasifod ko Kawasan, nika matiniay ko nikafalic no Europ pitooray kitakit no kafalic, fa'elohay kiwha caay pitolas a masadak.
S.PHON: == sənko~uŋħo~u~uj (***:ʦħo~u~urʦħ o~uf əŋɾanɬ~ɮ, aŋɾiʦan ʦħo~u~urʦħ, əpisʦo~upaɾ ʦħo~u~urʦħ) == *. ɾaɾəŋawan tana pifaɾiʦan to~u pito~uo~ur a o~unto~u itija, inkiris a ħo~uŋti ʦi ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u (****-to~umirəŋ ****-****). o~u to~uməsəkaj to~u tiŋso~ukiw, i **** miħəʦa mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "pito~uaj sapipaso~uʡəɾin" sapi ʦo~uʡaj ʦi ɾo~utəan, ʦi po~upə ɾəo~u x mipatirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u "mipaʡəsaj to~u pito~uo~ur" sanaj. to~uja miħəʦa o~u sapiɾəkapo~utaw ʦi annə b~b~vo~uɾəjn (****- ****) mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾijas to~u maʡaʦisaj a fafaħi ʦi ʦatħərinə o~uf ara*o~un (****-****), ʦaaj ka ħajɬ~ɮaən no~u pimamaan no~u tiŋso~ukiw, mipako~uko~ut to~u itijaaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħo~ujin a inkiris kakəriɬ~ɮan pito~uo~ur ʦi tħo~umas wo~uo~usɾəj (****-****), ʦaaj piɾaɾan, nano~uja pako~uko~utən ʦi tħo~umas o~u mifəɾiħaj, mapataj i pirəpət pipatajra i ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un. patirəŋ ħan ni ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u ʦi tħo~umas ʦranmər (****-****) a paɾa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~ur. i **** miħəʦa pakajni i kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit mapatirəŋ miħo~uko~uk: satakarawaj sarikəʦ : (*) o~u sako~uwan no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan pito~uo~ur ko~u inkəɾan. (*) o~u inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran misiikəɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw, o~u ħo~uŋti ko~u satakarawaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u inkiris kitakit. nano~uja maɾaɾijas ko~u pito~uo~uran no~u inkiris to~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw itija. ʦi ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u nao~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u pakajraan i, o~u sapiɾijasaw to~u sako~uwan no~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw, nika ʦaaj to~u ka ɾaħəʦi. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦi əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ saka ənəm (****-****) taŋasa ** ko~u miħəʦa ko~u ʡo~urip, o~uja faɬ~ɮəs a kaka to~u fafaħijan ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj ʦi marj ħo~uŋti ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj (****-****), o~una mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tiŋso~ukiw, o~u to~uməsəkaj to~u tiŋso~ukiw a mito~uo~uraj. maʦakat mapatirəŋ mifaɬ~ɮəs ʦiŋra to~u mito~uo~uraj to~u no~u kitakit a pito~uo~uran, sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaw to~u tiŋso~ukiw. o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw nano~uja miɾaɾiw tajra i *ənəb~va, minanam to~u ni ʦaɾb~vin to~u no~u to~uʡas sifanaʡ. mapatirəŋ ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ħo~uŋti (****-****) itija, itija patiko~u ko~u inkiris kitakit a pito~uo~ur. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾo~umao~uʦ no~u kitakit miħajɬ~ɮa to~u ʦəʦaj satakarawaj rikəʦ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a rikəʦ, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw sako~uwan i inkiris, ʦaaj to~u pafəɾi to~u maanan a pajso~u to~u ro~uma, nano~uja patirəŋən ni əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ħo~uŋti ʦi rəb~v.mattħəw parkər maɾa satakarawaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~uran kitakit i ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj kiwkaj. nano~uja o~u ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj a mija maɾa kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u no~u inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran a anɾikan kiwkaj a pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan. *. kasatəkəɬ~ɮ: to~uʡas rajraj no~u kərito~ukiw kiwkaj paɾito~usaan; aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u niɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan o~u kawanan. tiŋso~ukiw o~u kawanan, o~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj kai təro~uŋan (b~b~visħo~up *o~usəpħ ħaɾɾ, ****-*****b~via məɬ~ɮia****), ni ɾo~utə pakawiɾi, no~u pifaɾiʦ a pito~uo~uran masakawiɾi, no~u ʦinsinħo~u~uj maŋaɾəf ko~u kasawiɾi. i ** siʦian a sənko~uŋħo~u~uj maɾakiɾaʦ: takarawaj: pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u tiŋso~ukiw maɾakiɾaʦ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u taʡo~uŋ, marariɬ~ɮ miħisəiki, nai ɾanʦəɾo~ut anɬ~ɮrəwəs (****-****) ato~u arʦħb~b~visħo~up ɾao~u~uɬ~ɮ, (****- ****) ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan. iko~ur sato~u sərər sanaj to~u, itija i **** miħəʦa o~uja o~uxfo~urɬ~ɮ o~unto~u i, maɾaɾijaw a ʦiʡiʦəɾ. masərəɬ~ɮaj: pasifaʡəɾo~uħaj kiwkaj, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sakakaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, nai wiɾɾiam wiɾb~b~vərfo~urʦə, (****-****) ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan. miaɾa to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sapito~uɾo~un . ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj: mikiħaraj to~u kiwkaj, sjakaj ato~u po~unka, nai kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u pikiħaran a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u tajaɾən. i **** miħəʦa a ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj arʦħb~b~visħo~up ʦranmər miħapiw to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un . i **** miħəʦa miħapiw to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ʦi raɬ~ɮiw. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa itija nai ʦi *o~uħn mərb~b~vərkə (ʦ****- ****)ko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw paɬ~ɮətəŋ to~u "ʦiraɬ~ɮiwaj a sato~uɾo~un" . kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj: (*) sakariɬ~ɮan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. (*)miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un. (*)**** miħəʦa o~u inkiris a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. (*) inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran nai **** miħəʦa i ɾampəɬ~ɮ (ɾamb~b~vətħ) kapo~uɾo~uŋan kakəriɬ~ɮan ɾao~uʦ (****) miħəʦa saratataj ɾo~umao~uʦ itija, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uriraw a kasa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kiwkaj, i ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj taɬ~ɮamanaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ. ** miħəʦa kinaʦəʦaj o~u satakarawaj no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj, matija o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan kaɾo~umao~uʦan matəɾək: (*) sakakaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. (*) tasaaj sako~uɾiʦaj: paino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəka. (*) kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~ur. o~u paɾaħəʦi to~u so~uwaɾ kawasan a pano~ukəran (ko~urisimas kiwkaj) b~vs. to~uŋʦənʦiaw a ko~urisimas kiwkaj; o~u sini pito~uo~uran pano~ukər i kasəmsəman ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a kiwkaj. ʦaaj ko~u nano~u ro~uma tinso~ukiw ko~u sakaira no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj, o~u nano~u ano~uf ni ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u a ħo~uŋti. kaɾiməɾaan kina sənko~uŋħo~u~uj awaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a kawasan tamɬ~ɮaw, matija ʦi ɾo~utə ano~u əʦa ʦi ʦaɾb~vin ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan. o~urira a masasifo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kawasan, nika matiniaj ko~u nikafaɾiʦ no~u əo~u~uro~up pito~uo~uraj kitakit no~u kafaɾiʦ, faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwħa ʦaaj pito~uɾas a masaɬ~ɮak.
S.FORM: == Senkonghuy (聖公會:Church of England, Anglican Church, Episcopal Church) == 1. Lalengawan Tana pifalican to pitoor a onto itiya, Inkiris a hongti ci Hengli saka falo (1491-tomireng 1509-1547). O tomesekay to Tingsokiw, i 1521 miheca mitilid to "Pitoay sapipaso'elin" sapi co'ay ci Lotean, ci Pope Leo X mipatireng cingra to "Mipa'esay to pitoor" sanay. Toya miheca o sapilekapotaw ci Anne Boleyn (1507- 1536) mararamod, malaliyas to ma'acisay a fafahi ci Catherine of Aragon (1485-1536), caay ka haydaen no pimamaan no Tingsokiw, mipakokot to itiyaay citodongay hoyin a Inkiris kakeridan pitoor ci Thomas Woosley (1475-1530), caay pilalan, nanoya pakokoten ci Thomas o mifelihay, mapatay i pirepet pipatayra i London. Patireng han ni Hengli saka falo ci Thomas Cranmer (1489-1556) a pala kakeridan no pitoor. I 1534 miheca pakayni i kalomaocan no kitakit mapatireng mihokok: Satakaraway sarikec : (1) O sakowan no kakeridan pitoor ko Inkelan. (2) O Inkiris kitakit pitooran misiiked to Roma Tingsokiw, o hongti ko satakaraway kakeridan no Inkiris kitakit. Nanoya malaliyas ko Pitooran no Inkiris to Roma Tingsokiw itiya. Ci Hengli saka falo nao sapidoedoan to pakayraan i, o sapiliyasaw to sakowan no Roma Tingsokiw, nika caay to ka laheci. Midotoc ci Edward saka enem (1547-1553) tangasa 16 ko miheca ko 'orip, oya fades a kaka to fafahiyan ko midotocay ci Mary hongti ko midotocay (1553-1558), ona mitiliday cingra to pitilidan no Tingsokiw, o tomesekay to Tingsokiw a mitooray. Macakat mapatireng mifades cingra to mitooray to no kitakit a pitooran, sapipalowadaw to Tingsokiw. O 'alomanay tamdaw nanoya milaliw tayra i Geneva, minanam to ni Calvin to no to'as sifana'. Mapatireng ci Elizabeth hongti (1558-1603) itiya, itiya patiko ko Inkiris kitakit a pitoor. Tangasa i 1559 miheca 4 folad 29 romi'ad, lomaoc no kitakit mihayda to cecay satakaraway rikec, midotoc tonini a rikec, o pipalasawad to no Roma Tingsokiw sakowan i Inkiris, caay to pafeli to maanan a payso to Roma, nanoya patirengen ni Elizabeth hongti ci Rev.Matthew Parker mala satakaraway citodongay kakeridan no pitooran kitakit i Canterbury kiwkay. Nanoya o Canterbury a miya mala kacitodongan to no Inkiris kitakit pitooran a Anlikan kiwkay a pafaloco'an. 2. Kasateked: To'as rayray no Keritokiw kiwkay palitosaan; adihayay ko nidotocan o kawanan. Tingsokiw o kawanan, o Senkonghuy kai terongan (Bishop Joseph Hall, 1574-1656—Via Media1622), ni Lote pakawili, no pifalic a pitooran masakawili, no Cinsinhuy mangalef ko kasawili. I 18 sician a Senkonghuy malakilac: Takaraway: patodong to Tingsokiw malakilac ko citodongay to ta'ong, mararid mihiseiki, nai Lancelot Andrewes (1556-1626) ato Archbishop Laud, (1573- 1645) ko patodongan. Ikor sato serer sanay to, itiya i 1830 miheca oya Oxford onto i, malaliyaw a ci'icel. Masereday: pasifa'elohay kiwkay, misafaloco' to sakakaay ko Fangcalay Cudad, nai William Wilberforce, (1759-1833) ko patodongan. Miala to kapolongan sapitolon . Dadahalay: mikiharay to kiwkay, syakay ato ponka, nai kadademakan ko pikiharan a demak ko tayalen. I 1544 miheca a Canterbury Archbishop Cranmer mihapiw to kapolongan satolon . I 1549 miheca mihapiw to kapolongan satolon a tilid, caay ka ci radiw. Tangasa i 1550 miheca itiya nai ci John Merberke (c1510- 1585)Ko misanga'ay to radiw padeteng to "Ciradiway a satolon" . Katadamaan no Senkonghuy: (1) Sakaridan citodongay. (2)Midemak to kapolongan satolon. (3)1535 miheca o Inkiris a fangcalay cudad. (4) Inkiris kitakit pitooran nai 1920 miheca i Lamped (Lambeth) kapolongan kakeridan laoc (1867) miheca saratatay lomaoc itiya, mitahidang to polong no 'oriraw a kasa kakeridan no kiwkay, i Canterbury tadamanay kakeridan ko mikeriday to kalomaoc. 10 miheca kinacecay o satakaraway no Senkonghuy, matiya o kapolongan kalomaocan matelek: (1) Sakakaay ko Fangcalay Cudad. (2) Tasaay sakolicay: Paino' ato pitaheka. (3) Kakeridan no pitoor. O palaheci to sowal Kawasan a panokeran (Korisimas kiwkay) Vs. Tongcenciaw a Korisimas kiwkay; o Sini pitooran panoker i kasemseman romi'ad a kiwkay. Caay ko nano Roma Tinsokiw ko sakaira no Senkonghuy, o nano anof ni Hengli saka falo a hongti. Kalimelaan kina Senkonghuy awaay ko tadamaanay a kawasan tamdaw, matiya ci Lote ano eca ci Calvin ko katadamaan. Orira a masasifod ko Kawasan, nika matiniay ko nikafalic no Europ pitooray kitakit no kafalic, fa'elohay kiwha caay pitolas a masadak.
S.PHON: == sənko~uŋħo~u~uj (***:ʦħo~u~urʦħ o~uf əŋɾanɬ~ɮ, aŋɾiʦan ʦħo~u~urʦħ, əpisʦo~upaɾ ʦħo~u~urʦħ) == *. ɾaɾəŋawan tana pifaɾiʦan to~u pito~uo~ur a o~unto~u itija, inkiris a ħo~uŋti ʦi ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u (****-to~umirəŋ ****-****). o~u to~uməsəkaj to~u tiŋso~ukiw, i **** miħəʦa mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "pito~uaj sapipaso~uʡəɾin" sapi ʦo~uʡaj ʦi ɾo~utəan, ʦi po~upə ɾəo~u x mipatirəŋ ʦiŋra to~u "mipaʡəsaj to~u pito~uo~ur" sanaj. to~uja miħəʦa o~u sapiɾəkapo~utaw ʦi annə b~b~vo~uɾəjn (****- ****) mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾaɾijas to~u maʡaʦisaj a fafaħi ʦi ʦatħərinə o~uf ara*o~un (****-****), ʦaaj ka ħajɬ~ɮaən no~u pimamaan no~u tiŋso~ukiw, mipako~uko~ut to~u itijaaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ħo~ujin a inkiris kakəriɬ~ɮan pito~uo~ur ʦi tħo~umas wo~uo~usɾəj (****-****), ʦaaj piɾaɾan, nano~uja pako~uko~utən ʦi tħo~umas o~u mifəɾiħaj, mapataj i pirəpət pipatajra i ɾo~unɬ~ɮo~un. patirəŋ ħan ni ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u ʦi tħo~umas ʦranmər (****-****) a paɾa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~ur. i **** miħəʦa pakajni i kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit mapatirəŋ miħo~uko~uk: satakarawaj sarikəʦ : (*) o~u sako~uwan no~u kakəriɬ~ɮan pito~uo~ur ko~u inkəɾan. (*) o~u inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran misiikəɬ~ɮ to~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw, o~u ħo~uŋti ko~u satakarawaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u inkiris kitakit. nano~uja maɾaɾijas ko~u pito~uo~uran no~u inkiris to~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw itija. ʦi ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u nao~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~uan to~u pakajraan i, o~u sapiɾijasaw to~u sako~uwan no~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw, nika ʦaaj to~u ka ɾaħəʦi. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ʦi əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ saka ənəm (****-****) taŋasa ** ko~u miħəʦa ko~u ʡo~urip, o~uja faɬ~ɮəs a kaka to~u fafaħijan ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj ʦi marj ħo~uŋti ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj (****-****), o~una mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ʦiŋra to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan no~u tiŋso~ukiw, o~u to~uməsəkaj to~u tiŋso~ukiw a mito~uo~uraj. maʦakat mapatirəŋ mifaɬ~ɮəs ʦiŋra to~u mito~uo~uraj to~u no~u kitakit a pito~uo~uran, sapipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaw to~u tiŋso~ukiw. o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj tamɬ~ɮaw nano~uja miɾaɾiw tajra i *ənəb~va, minanam to~u ni ʦaɾb~vin to~u no~u to~uʡas sifanaʡ. mapatirəŋ ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ħo~uŋti (****-****) itija, itija patiko~u ko~u inkiris kitakit a pito~uo~ur. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾo~umao~uʦ no~u kitakit miħajɬ~ɮa to~u ʦəʦaj satakarawaj rikəʦ, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a rikəʦ, o~u pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u ro~uma tiŋso~ukiw sako~uwan i inkiris, ʦaaj to~u pafəɾi to~u maanan a pajso~u to~u ro~uma, nano~uja patirəŋən ni əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ħo~uŋti ʦi rəb~v.mattħəw parkər maɾa satakarawaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~uran kitakit i ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj kiwkaj. nano~uja o~u ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj a mija maɾa kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan to~u no~u inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran a anɾikan kiwkaj a pafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan. *. kasatəkəɬ~ɮ: to~uʡas rajraj no~u kərito~ukiw kiwkaj paɾito~usaan; aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u niɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan o~u kawanan. tiŋso~ukiw o~u kawanan, o~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj kai təro~uŋan (b~b~visħo~up *o~usəpħ ħaɾɾ, ****-*****b~via məɬ~ɮia****), ni ɾo~utə pakawiɾi, no~u pifaɾiʦ a pito~uo~uran masakawiɾi, no~u ʦinsinħo~u~uj maŋaɾəf ko~u kasawiɾi. i ** siʦian a sənko~uŋħo~u~uj maɾakiɾaʦ: takarawaj: pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u tiŋso~ukiw maɾakiɾaʦ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u taʡo~uŋ, marariɬ~ɮ miħisəiki, nai ɾanʦəɾo~ut anɬ~ɮrəwəs (****-****) ato~u arʦħb~b~visħo~up ɾao~u~uɬ~ɮ, (****- ****) ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan. iko~ur sato~u sərər sanaj to~u, itija i **** miħəʦa o~uja o~uxfo~urɬ~ɮ o~unto~u i, maɾaɾijaw a ʦiʡiʦəɾ. masərəɬ~ɮaj: pasifaʡəɾo~uħaj kiwkaj, misafaɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u sakakaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, nai wiɾɾiam wiɾb~b~vərfo~urʦə, (****-****) ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan. miaɾa to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sapito~uɾo~un . ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾaj: mikiħaraj to~u kiwkaj, sjakaj ato~u po~unka, nai kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan ko~u pikiħaran a ɬ~ɮəmak ko~u tajaɾən. i **** miħəʦa a ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj arʦħb~b~visħo~up ʦranmər miħapiw to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un . i **** miħəʦa miħapiw to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ʦi raɬ~ɮiw. taŋasa i **** miħəʦa itija nai ʦi *o~uħn mərb~b~vərkə (ʦ****- ****)ko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u raɬ~ɮiw paɬ~ɮətəŋ to~u "ʦiraɬ~ɮiwaj a sato~uɾo~un" . kataɬ~ɮamaan no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj: (*) sakariɬ~ɮan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. (*)miɬ~ɮəmak to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan sato~uɾo~un. (*)**** miħəʦa o~u inkiris a faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. (*) inkiris kitakit pito~uo~uran nai **** miħəʦa i ɾampəɬ~ɮ (ɾamb~b~vətħ) kapo~uɾo~uŋan kakəriɬ~ɮan ɾao~uʦ (****) miħəʦa saratataj ɾo~umao~uʦ itija, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ʡo~uriraw a kasa kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kiwkaj, i ʦantərb~b~vo~u~urj taɬ~ɮamanaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u kaɾo~umao~uʦ. ** miħəʦa kinaʦəʦaj o~u satakarawaj no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj, matija o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan kaɾo~umao~uʦan matəɾək: (*) sakakaaj ko~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ. (*) tasaaj sako~uɾiʦaj: paino~uʡ ato~u pitaħəka. (*) kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pito~uo~ur. o~u paɾaħəʦi to~u so~uwaɾ kawasan a pano~ukəran (ko~urisimas kiwkaj) b~vs. to~uŋʦənʦiaw a ko~urisimas kiwkaj; o~u sini pito~uo~uran pano~ukər i kasəmsəman ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a kiwkaj. ʦaaj ko~u nano~u ro~uma tinso~ukiw ko~u sakaira no~u sənko~uŋħo~u~uj, o~u nano~u ano~uf ni ħəŋɾi saka faɾo~u a ħo~uŋti. kaɾiməɾaan kina sənko~uŋħo~u~uj awaaj ko~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj a kawasan tamɬ~ɮaw, matija ʦi ɾo~utə ano~u əʦa ʦi ʦaɾb~vin ko~u kataɬ~ɮamaan. o~urira a masasifo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u kawasan, nika matiniaj ko~u nikafaɾiʦ no~u əo~u~uro~up pito~uo~uraj kitakit no~u kafaɾiʦ, faʡəɾo~uħaj kiwħa ʦaaj pito~uɾas a masaɬ~ɮak.
